corners.name: Turn 1 (First Curve)
corners.notes: Entry to the S-curves. Can be taken at higher speed.

corners.name: S-Curves (S1)
corners.notes: The iconic S-curves. High-speed sequence requiring rhythm.

corners.name: Degner 1
corners.notes: Named after Ernst Degner. Entry over a blind crest.

corners.name: Hairpin
corners.notes: Tight hairpin. Very slow. Main overtaking point under DRS.

corners.name: Spoon Curve (Turn 2)
corners.notes: The Spoon curve — long right-hander. Heavy tyre load.

corners.name: 130R
corners.notes: Named for its 130m radius. Was one of the scariest corners; now faster with modern aero.

corners.name: Casio Chicane (T1)
corners.notes: Final chicane before the start/finish. Drivers cut kerbs aggressively.
